note: Frozen approved quick-win snapshot including four additional Koblenz Zentrum landmark fixes.

proposals.proposalReason: Medium consensus for a location target with google_places and supporting secondary source.
proposals.manualCheckHint: confirm museum entrance instead of area center

proposals.proposalReason: Medium consensus for a point-like target with google_places and supporting secondary source.
proposals.manualCheckHint: prefer named building over surrounding street point

proposals.proposalReason: Manual quick-win anchored to known Florinsmarkt church footprint; current point appears offset from the building focus.

proposals.proposalReason: Manual quick-win towards the church core in the Altstadt cluster; reduces likely drift to nearby block edge.

proposals.proposalReason: Monument target refined toward Görresplatz column center; small but relevant map-level correction for exact-object display.

proposals.proposalReason: Manual quick-win aligned to the Rathaus-front fountain area (Willi-Hörter-Platz) to improve symbolic city landmark placement.
